zh: 百元级别最佳入门选择，McDermott 品质背书
图形贴面工艺，花色多样好看
en: Best entry-level choice under $250, backed by McDermott quality
Graphic overlay designs with diverse patterns
Jump cue models (LJ1/LJ2) available at just $155

suitable_for.zh: 台球新手的第一根自用杆。预算 $100-250，不想用球房公杆但又不确定自己会不会长期打球的人。
suitable_for.en: A beginner's first personal cue. Budget $100-250, for those who don't want to use house cues but aren't sure about long-term commitment to the sport.

review.zh: Lucky 系列是'新手第一杆'的标准答案之一。$135 就能买到一根有 McDermott 品质保证的两截式球杆，比淘宝杂牌 $50 的杆好太多——直度有保障、接牙精度合格、打感也更扎实。虽然前节只是普通枫木，没有低偏转技术加持，但对新手来说根本用不到那些高级功能。等技术进步了再升级 G-Series 或其他品牌也不迟。三年保修虽然不如 G-Series 的终身保修，但在这个价位已经很良心了。
review.en: The Lucky series is one of the standard answers to 'what should be my first cue.' At $135 you get a two-piece cue with McDermott quality assurance — far better than no-name $50 cues in terms of straightness, joint precision, and solid hit. While the maple shaft lacks low-deflection technology, beginners won't need those advanced features anyway. Upgrade to G-Series or other brands later as skills improve. The three-year warranty, while not matching G-Series' lifetime coverage, is very generous at this price point.
